title: Neon Edge | Module 11: Going Public
text: Neon Edge | Module 11: Going Public Going Public Chapter 11: The Disclosure Protocol S-1 Filing: 0xPUBLIC 📜 Securities HUD Section 11 Liability Strict liability for issuers if a registration statement contains an untrue statement of **material fact** or omits a material fact. Materiality Information is material if there is a substantial likelihood that a reasonable investor would consider it important in making an investment decision. The Mission Zeeva is taking SP Corp public. To protect the public "Partition," the Council requires a full truth-dump. If Zeeva hides the "Sky-Tower Structural Glitch," the IPO is a crime. I. The Disclosure Scrubber Scrub the draft Prospectus for Material Omissions . Click to flag statements that violate Section 11 of the Sprawl Securities Act. SECTION: USE OF PROCEEDS "Proceeds will be used to scale the Sector 7 Sky-Tower and upgrade foundational haptic interfaces." SECTION: RISK FACTORS (FLAGGED?) "Management believes current structures are stable. [Omission: Recent telemetry shows a 12% stress fracture in the primary load-bearing shard.]" SECTION: FINANCIAL DATA (FLAGGED?) "Projected revenues for 2078: 50,000,000 CR. [Fact: Zeeva's internal AI actually predicts a 40% chance of total project insolvency.]" SECTION: MANAGEMENT "The firm is led by Zeeva (Structural Architect) and Sammy (Strategic Fixer)." Investor Confidence Index Current Sentiment: NEUTRAL Transparency Score: 0 Liability Risk: HIGH SEC Terminal: IPO Finalization "By scrubbing the prospectus for ... Marketing Hype Material Misstatements , Zeeva ensures the 'Truth in Securities' mandate is met. Failure to disclose the stress fracture would have triggered ... Section 11 Liability A Founder Bonus , destroying the trust necessary for ... Staying Private Asset Partitioning (Scaling) . The IPO will proceed at a valuation of ... Fair Value Inflated Value based on full disclosure." Finalize Public Offering Acknowledge
